title: calcearia erythrocarpa
intro: Calcearia erythrocarpa, also known as Red-berried Calceolaria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Calceolariaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Calcearia erythrocarpa are thought to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
